description: General occasions and happenings suitable for any world setting.
occasions: A wedding
A joyful celebration of two lives joining together.
A funeral
A solemn gathering to honor someone who has passed.
A tournament
A contest of skill where champions prove their worth.
A trial
A public judgment where guilt or innocence hangs in the balance.
A feast
A lavish meal shared by many, celebrating abundance.
A market day
A bustling gathering of buyers and sellers trading goods.
An expedition
A planned journey into unknown or dangerous territory.
A reunion
A gathering of people separated by time or distance.
A race
A contest of speed where every second counts.
An auction
A competitive sale where the highest bidder wins.
A ceremony
A formal ritual marking an important moment.
A rescue mission
A dangerous effort to save someone in peril.
A birthday
A celebration marking another year of someone's life.
A festival
A community celebration with music, food, and joy.
A parade
A procession of people marching for celebration or cause.
A voyage
A long journey by sea or land to a distant place.
A truce
A fragile pause in conflict, hope hanging by a thread.
A concert
A performance of music for an eager audience.
A hunt
An organized pursuit of prey through wild terrain.
A fair
A traveling show of games, rides, and spectacle.
A dance
A gathering where people move together to music.
An earthquake
The ground shaking violently, toppling what stood firm.
A flood
Rising water overwhelming the land and its people.
A solar eclipse
The sun going dark in the middle of the day.
A drought
A long stretch without rain, drying the land.
A shipwreck
A vessel broken apart by storm or reef.
A storm
A violent upheaval of wind, rain, and lightning.
A masquerade
A gathering where everyone hides behind masks.
A pilgrimage
A sacred journey to a place of meaning.
A migration
A mass movement of people or creatures to a new place.
A harvest
The gathering of crops at the end of a growing season.
A discovery
The finding of something unknown, changing everything.
A homecoming
The return to a place once called home.
A blizzard
A fierce snowstorm that buries the world in white.
An inheritance
The passing of something valuable from one generation to the next.
A fire
Flames spreading beyond control, consuming what they touch.
A talent show
A showcase where people reveal their hidden gifts.
